## Pre-PR Checks
- [ ] T0+T1 green on branch

## Consultation During Development
- [ ] Audio: no audio path changes / AE consulted (link: ___)
- [ ] Security: no security boundary changes / SecSpec consulted (link: ___)
- [ ] UX: no user-facing changes / UX consulted (link: ___)
- [ ] Architecture: no arch changes / Architect approach check (link: ___)

## Documentation
- [ ] No docs needed / Docs updated, TW consulted (link: ___)

## Tests
- [ ] Tests added/updated for all ACs
- [ ] Test coverage description: ___

## Story Scope
- [ ] All changes within assigned story scope
